name: CareWatch AI
description: An agentic AI system for chronic disease monitoring that uses multi-agent orchestration (CrewAI), RAG-based medical knowledge retrieval (ChromaDB + IBM Granite embeddings), and predictive analytics to monitor patients with diabetes, hypertension, and cardiac conditions in real time.
problem_statement: Problem Statement No. 27 – AI Agent for Chronic Disease Monitoring

agents.name: Ingestion Agent
agents.role: Normalizes and validates patient wearable data streams

agents.name: Analysis Agent
agents.role: Performs anomaly detection and risk assessment on vitals

agents.name: RAG Knowledge Agent
agents.role: Retrieves evidence-based guidelines from WHO, ICMR, AHA

agents.name: Alert & Recommendation Agent
agents.role: Generates dual-mode outputs for patients and doctors
